title: Kraken Robotics acquires Covelya Group for $615M
description:

title: Blue Origin continues work on lunar landers during recovery from New Glenn explosion
description:
Blue Origin is continuing to develop its Blue Moon lunar landers, with seven vehicles in production, while recovering from the New Glenn pad explosion more than a month ago.
The post Blue Origin continues work on lunar landers during recovery from New Glenn explosion appeared first on SpaceNews.

title: SpaceX Share Price Catalysts
description: SpaceX will be able to shape its valuation with key execution on building out and monetizing AI data centers and executing on Starship and V3 satellite deployment.

title: Korea’s LG Innotek to begin building $1B semiconductor substrate plant in Vietnam’s Hai Phong in Q3/2026
description: LG Innotek is set to kick off the construction of its $1 billion semiconductor substrate packaging plant in Vietnam's northern coastal city of Hai Phong, in the third quarter of 2026.

title: STAT+: I spoke to Anthropic’s CEO about how AI may affect biotech. Here’s what I learned
description: Call AI in biotech hype at your peril. There are real reasons that pharmaceutical companies are embracing this technology right now.

title: This humanoid robotics company is going public, but its CEO isn’t promising a robot in your home anytime soon
description: While other humanoid startups chase sky-high valuations, Agility Robotics is betting its future on execution — and a SPAC.

title: WORLDCHANGING SpaceX Will Deliver Anything Anywhere
description: Everyone knows SpaceX is making launching to space 100 to 1000 times lower cost with Starship. The volume will also go up by thousands of times. How can people and things get back at high volumes and low cost? SpaceX is solving that as well. SpaceX is making the return from space or from Starships .

title: Humanoid says KinetIQ Ascend reinforcement learning approaches human-level dexterity
description:
Humanoid says its KinetIQ Ascend approach can reach 99.9% manipulation reliability at human speed and beyond for industrial tasks.

title: Latitude plans to conduct first launch from Oman
description:

title: When Refusal Doesn’t Matter: Operation Epic Fury and the Erosion of Host Nation Consent
description: When the U.S. military launched its war against Iran in Feb. 2026, it did not just dismantle Iranian military capabilities. It shattered the illusion that the United States would consult with its closest allies and that an ally’s refusal to grant base access can stop an American war in motion.
